title: Zombie Queen
description:
ABOUT THIS GAMEZombie Queen is a fast-paced wave-based zombie shooter where survival depends on your reflexes, firepower, and upgrades.

Fight through up to 100 intense waves as endless hordes of zombies swarm the battlefield. Face up to 1,000 enemies at once, earn rewards, gain experience, unlock upgrades, and push your survival skills to the limit.

Key Features• Survive up to 100 action-packed waves

• Battle massive zombie hordes with up to 1,000 enemies on screen

• Use Assault Rifles and Grenade Launchers to clear the battlefield

• Gain experience, level up, and unlock powerful and sexy upgrades

• Adult-themed content intended for mature audiences

Controls• Left Mouse Button — Shoot

• Right Mouse Button — Parry incoming ranged attacks

Shortcuts• F1 — English Language

• F2 — Chinese Language

• F3 — Open Shop

• F4 — Experience Monitor

Can you survive all 100 waves and become the ultimate Zombie Queen?
description_short: Fight through 100 waves of massive zombie hordes in this fast-paced wave-based shooter. Blast up to 1,000 zombies with powerful weapons, earn upgrades, level up your character, and survive the apocalypse.
